name: vibe-coding-plugins
description: A curated collection of high-quality MCP servers and skills

plugins.name: grep-by-vercel
plugins.description: Search over a million public GitHub repositories using grep.app's official MCP server. Find real-world code examples, implementation patterns, and learn from open-source projects.

plugins.name: notebooklm-skill
plugins.description: Query Google NotebookLM notebooks for source-grounded, citation-backed answers from Gemini. Communicate directly with your uploaded documents.

plugins.name: napkin
plugins.description: Persistent mistake memory for Claude Code. Logs corrections and patterns to a per-repo scratchpad so your agent stops repeating mistakes.

plugins.name: claudeception
plugins.description: Autonomous skill extraction and continuous learning. Claude extracts and preserves learned knowledge into reusable skills.

plugins.name: rust-skills
plugins.description: A collection of 179 rules that AI coding agents can use when writing Rust. Covers ownership, error handling, memory, API design, testing, performance, and more.
